_instructions: To add a new case study: (1) add an object to `studies`, (2) drop photos into the theme `assets/` folder with a `cs-` prefix and register each filename in snippets/case-study-assets.liquid, (3) reference them in the `photos` array as `asset:filename.jpg`, (4) create a Shopify page with the same `slug` as its handle and assign template `page.case-study`. The first entry in `photos` becomes the hero AND the card cover; the rest render as a gallery with a click-to-zoom lightbox. The `hero_image` and `gallery` fields are still supported for back-compat.

studies.title: Guruvandana 2026 — Karnataka School
studies.subtitle: A gold Guru-Shishya figurative trophy honouring teachers at a Karnataka school's Guruvandana ceremony
studies.tagline: When a school wants to honour its teachers, the trophy should bow before them — just as the student does.

photos.alt: Gold Guru-Shishya figurative trophy for Guruvandana 2026 — a kneeling student in pranam pose before a standing teacher, cast in gold finish, mounted on a red wooden base with a four-line Kannada dedication plaque.
photos.caption: The finished Guruvandana trophy — Guru-Shishya in gold, delivered for a Karnataka school's teacher appreciation ceremony

studies.about_client: A Karnataka school that commissioned a custom Guruvandana trophy for their annual teacher appreciation ceremony. The school's Guruvandana event brings students together to honour their teachers with a formal felicitation programme — a tradition deeply rooted in the Guru-Shishya (teacher-student) relationship that has defined Indian education for centuries.
studies.about_event: Guruvandana (ಗುರುವಂದನ) — literally 'reverence to the Guru' — is an annual ceremony where students and alumni formally honour their teachers. Distinct from Teachers' Day, school Guruvandana events are often organised by alumni associations or parent bodies and carry deeper ceremonial weight, including a formal Guru-Shishya felicitation, speeches and gift-giving. The trophy commemorates the school's 2026 edition.
studies.design_brief: The brief called for a trophy that embodied the Guru-Shishya relationship visually — not just a nameplate, but a sculpture that tells the story. The figurative piece shows a student in full pranam (kneeling, head bowed) before the standing teacher. Cast in warm gold finish, it transforms a centuries-old gesture of reverence into a permanent keepsake. The four-line Kannada dedication on the plaque — school name, occasion and event name — grounds the universal image in this specific community's story.
production_notes: Cast polyresin Guru-Shishya figurative group — student in pranam pose, teacher standing
Full gold metallic finish across the entire sculpture including the dedicated inscription plaque
Four-line Kannada text embossed directly on the gold plaque: school name, details and ಗುರುವಂದನ (Guruvandana)
Red lacquered wooden base providing warm contrast to the gold finish
studies.outcome: Delivered for the 2026 Guruvandana ceremony. The trophy's figurative design made it immediately legible to every attendee — no one needed to read the plaque to understand the sentiment. The Kannada inscription personalised it to this school and this year.

studies.title: Karnataka Sumana Sadhaka 2026
studies.subtitle: A custom statue award for SumanTV Kannada's flagship recognition program
studies.tagline: When a TV network needs a trophy that looks as iconic as their brand mark — we make the brand the trophy.

photos.alt: Karnataka Sumana Sadhaka 2026 trophy — a gold sculpted 'S' wrapping a blue globe, topped with the SumanTV Kannada Chikkaballapur logo, mounted on a polished wood base with engraved gold nameplate.
photos.caption: The finished award, ready for the broadcast ceremony

studies.about_client: SumanTV Kannada is the Kannada-language arm of the SumanTV digital news network (parent: PlayEven Info Pvt Ltd, Hyderabad). The Chikkaballapur district unit produces local Karnataka news, civic stories and human-interest features for YouTube and OTT audiences. SumanTV's regional channels collectively reach millions of viewers across South India.
studies.about_event: The Karnataka Sumana Sadhaka Awards (ಸುಮನ ಸಾಧಕ — literally 'noble achiever') is SumanTV Kannada's flagship recognition program, honouring individuals whose perseverance, craft and public contribution have shifted the cultural needle in Karnataka. The 2026 edition's honourees include the India Women's Blind Cricket team captains — Deepika TC, Kavya V and Kavya NR — recognised for excellence on the international stage.
studies.design_brief: The client wanted a trophy that read as the brand at a glance. Most TV-award trophies bolt a logo plate onto a generic statue — we inverted that. The award itself is a sculpted, oversized 'S' (the channel's brand initial) sweeping around a richly enamelled globe, with the network's badge as the crown. Every angle reinforces the channel's identity; the engraved gold plaque on the wood plinth carries the event line.
production_notes: Sculpted 'S' form in cast metal with electroplated 24K gold-tone finish
Hand-painted enamel globe with metallic gold continents
Brushed-gold disc inlay carrying the SumanTV Kannada Chikkaballapur logo, mounted at the crown of the 'S'
Mirror-polished solid wood plinth with chamfered profile
Engraved brass nameplate in bordered serif type: 'KARNATAKA SUMANA SADHAKA 2026'
studies.outcome: Delivered on time for the awards ceremony. The trophy has become the visual anchor of SumanTV Kannada's award show coverage — featured in every broadcast cutaway, photo op and social post around the program.

studies.tagline: From Bengaluru to Mauritius — precision-crafted trophies for competitions that cross borders.

photos.alt: MSQCCw 11th Quality Youth Initiatives Summit 2026 — gold oval shield trophy for the Mathematics competition, with engraved plaque on a black marble base.
photos.caption: Mathematics competition award — oval shield in gold finish on black marble base

photos.alt: MSQCCw 11th Quality Youth Initiatives Summit 2026 — wave-form gold trophy for Kavi Samelan (Hindi Poem) competition, with full event details and MSQCCw-WCTQEE branding.
photos.caption: Kavi Samelan (Hindi Poetry) award — wave-form trophy with full summit branding

studies.about_client: The Mauritian Society for Quality Circles and Community Wellness (MSQCCw) is an organisation dedicated to promoting quality culture, innovation and excellence among youth in Mauritius. It operates under the patronage of the World Council for Total Quality and Excellence in Education (WCTQEE) and organises the annual Quality Youth Initiatives Summit — a multi-event competition encompassing Debate, Mathematics, Poster & Slogan Making, and Kavi Samelan (Hindi Poetry). The 2026 summit runs 24–29 July in the Republic of Mauritius.
studies.about_event: The 11th Quality Youth Initiatives Summit 2026 is an international gathering of students and educators competing under the theme 'Youth Leading Quality, Innovation and Excellence.' Organised by MSQCCw under WCTQEE patronage, the summit features four competition tracks. Meru Trophy supplied individual recognition awards for the Mathematics and Kavi Samelan (Hindi Poetry) tracks — trophies that travel from Bengaluru to Mauritius to honour young achievers on an international stage.
studies.design_brief: Two distinct trophy forms were required for different competition disciplines. The Mathematics award uses a classic oval shield format — timeless, authoritative, instantly legible as an academic prize. The Kavi Samelan award uses a flowing wave form — a dynamic silhouette that evokes creative expression and the rhythm of poetry. Both carry the full event identity: summit name, date, location, organiser name, patronage line, competition category, and theme text. The brief was clarity at a distance and dignity on the shelf.
production_notes: Oval shield trophy: cast metal frame in electroplated gold finish, black marble base, engraved brass nameplate
Wave-form trophy: sculpted wave silhouette in gold-finish metal, black solid base, full engraved panel with summit details

photos.alt: KPL-S 2025 Winner and Runner-Up trophies — a tall and shorter gold trophy pair on black bases, with engraved 'Winner' and 'Runner' nameplates.

studies.about_client: KPL-S is a local sports league organising competitive matches and seasonal tournaments. Like many community leagues, KPL-S uses end-of-season trophies to formally recognise the top two finishers and celebrate the competitive spirit of the league.
studies.about_event: The KPL-S 2025 season concluded with a podium trophy presentation for the Winner and Runner-Up teams. Matching black resin bases for both trophies
Engraved gold nameplate: 'KPL-S · WINNER 2025' / 'KPL-S · RUNNER 2025'
Proportional height difference maintained for clear podium hierarchy when displayed side by side

The 2026 edition marked a significant milestone: 20 years since the company's founding. As part of the celebrations, Laguna recognised its top-performing vendor and supply-chain partners across four categories — Best Factory (KPR), Best Service Provider (Winner), Best Fabric Supplier (Runner Up) and Best Grassroot OBR Housekeeping.

Each trophy features the '20 Years of Laguna' gold plaque and the Laguna Parivar Milan event branding. Best Service Provider (Winner): dark angular sculptural figure, black base, gold event plaque
Best Fabric Supplier (Runner Up): similar angular dark form, slightly smaller, gold event plaque
Best Grassroot OBR Housekeeping: gold star figurine on decorated festive base with event plaque
All four trophies share consistent '20 Years of Laguna / Laguna Parivar Milan' plaque branding
studies.outcome: Four vendor-recognition trophies delivered for Laguna Clothing's landmark 20th anniversary celebration. The awards honoured the supply-chain partners central to two decades of world-class shirt manufacturing.
